units.content: text can be split at predicate boundaries rather than syntactic boundaries
each unit represents one cognitive or perceptual act
decomposition graph can track dependencies between units
inferences depend on observations or other inferences
the depth of dependency chains indicates ontological load
architecture follows pipeline: raw text → haiku decomposition → PredicateUnit graph → metrics → DataEntry objects
PredicateUnit dataclass contains id, unit_type, verb, content, intensity, depends_on, source_text, epistemological_route
DecompositionGraph dataclass tracks units, edges, counts, density, depth, grounding ratio, and empirical grounding flag
parse_decomposition_response function extracts units from JSON/text
build_graph computes metrics including observation density, inference depth, and grounding ratio
observations map to measurement entries; inferences map to prediction entries
decomposition_to_data_entries bridges graph output to DataEntry objects for coupling map
